creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
The patch was merged from OpenZFS in commit dd21556857e8d40f66bf5ad54754d9d52669ebf7.

Is the bug also present in stable/14?  It's not clear to me where the problem was first introduced.  The last OpenZFS merge there was 2.2.7, merge commit 2ec8b69480708185a273254e4e254140eb2ce633.
